subcodes.first_line: O Ism-i-Júd! Upon thee be My Glory! We have heard thy mention and hearkened unto thy call [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسم جود علیک بهائی ذکرت را شنیدیم و ندایت را اصغا نمودیم هیچ عزی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @power of prayer, @thankfulness; gratitude, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @suffering and imprisonment
